ShortDescription.Value: Dynamically adjust service building upkeep according to a predefined rate

Publish.LongDescription:
# Smart Upkeep Manager Dynamically adjust service building upkeep according to a predefined rate
Get balanced upkeep cost for all service buildings dependant on various functions provided by the building.
Each factor is manually set with a predefined default value, but it's also possible to change every factors rates. All values can also be set to 0 too, making all upkeep free.
# All options are optional.
If you think some values are very out of balance and just changing the sliders won't make difference, feel free to reach out.
- Does not modify the save itself. Removing the mod will revert everything back to vanilla.
Publish.ChangeLog: - No major code changes. Recent Skyve update that came with Summer Solistice (1.6.0f1) patch should fix the random unsubscribe issue. - Minor code cleanup.
